plugins.name: quarkus-migration
plugins.description: Spring Boot to Quarkus migration (official migrate-spring-to-quarkus skill + Quarkus framework-dev skills, Apache-2.0; see ATTRIBUTION.md) plus agent and OpenRewrite reference.

plugins.name: react-modernization
plugins.description: Modernize React apps: 18->19 codemods, class->Hooks, CRA->Vite. Skill + agent.

plugins.name: sdlc-toolkit
plugins.description: Peer review + Jira/GitHub lifecycle automation via Atlassian & GitHub MCP. Use alongside either migration plugin.
